Package cz.cvut.fel.omo.model

Class Event

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.Event
public class Event
extends java.lang.Object
This class represents Event.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Oľga Ostashchuk, Tereza Lodrová, Michal Pechník
